# services.syshud

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.syshud`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.syshud.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable syshud. |
| `services.syshud.package` | `package` | The syshud package to use. |
| `services.syshud.settings` | `section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Configuration for syshud. All available options can be found here: <https://github.com/System64fumo/syshud?tab=readme-ov-file#configuration> |
| `services.syshud.style` | `null or absolute path or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Custom CSS style for syshud. If the value is set to a path literal, then the path will be used as the css file. Default style is available here: <https://github.com/System64fumo/syshud/blob/main/style.css> |
